hawkish_phrases: The Committee would be particularly alert to indications of more persistent inflationary pressures, and would if necessary act forcefully in response.
Three members preferred a 0.5 percentage point increase in Bank Rate at this meeting.
robust cost and price pressures, including the current tightness of the labour market, and the risk that those pressures become more persistent
core consumer goods price inflation is higher in the United Kingdom than in the euro area and in the United States
Faster policy tightening now would help to bring inflation back to the target sustainably in the medium term
dovish_phrases: CPI inflation was projected to fall to a little above the 2% target in two years' time
to be well below the target in three years, mainly reflecting weaker domestic pressures
Bank staff now expect GDP to fall by 0.3% in the second quarter as a whole
demand might be starting to slow in line with the May forecast
summary: The MPC voted 6-3 to increase Bank Rate by 0.25 percentage points to 1.25%, with three members preferring a 0.5 percentage point hike, emphasizing persistent inflationary pressures and signaling willingness to act forcefully if needed.
